resolution_note: Pre-bolt-model spec with stale initiative directory paths. Superseded by bolt model implementation. Vision review concept valid; requires fresh spec.
outcome: Closed as superseded/stale. The bolt model (epic-initiative-lug-bolt-model-v1, completed 2026-06-02) implemented the initiative data structure and lifecycle. This spec was authored pre-bolt with incorrect directory paths (references lugs/bytype/initiative/ rather than initiatives/bytype/initiative/) and predates the bolt schema. The Ozi vision-doc-review process concept remains valid but needs a fresh spec authored post-bolt, referencing the correct initiative directory, bolt schema, and current Ozi cadence. Open a new spec (spec-ozi-vision-review-v2) when vision doc review becomes a priority.
title: Ozi Initiative Protocol -- Vision Review, Flow Completeness Gate, Initiative Lifecycle
one_liner: Define how Ozi reviews spoke vision docs, identifies incomplete flows, opens design discussions where direction is unclear, creates initiatives with downstream lugs, and closes with celebration.
why_this_matters: Vision docs give Ozi a structured view of what each spoke intended vs what was built. Without a protocol for acting on that view, gaps sit in vision docs indefinitely. The initiative protocol closes the loop: Ozi reads the vision, identifies incomplete end-to-end flows, gets direction where needed, creates a bounded commitment to complete the flow, manages downstream lugs, and marks completion with explicit celebration. This is how the Wheel finishes things, not just starts them.

design_decisions.initiative_vs_epic: Epics are architectural waves (how the system is built). Initiatives are feature completion commitments (what the user can do with it, end-to-end). An initiative may span zero or multiple epics. Scope is defined by user-facing value, not technical architecture.
design_decisions.design_discussion_trigger: Ozi opens a design discussion when a vision doc's Deprecation/Merit Assessment says PIVOT or ASSESS, or when a gap's recommendation is unclear. Ozi does not create an initiative for an unclear direction -- it asks first. Once Mario provides direction, Ozi creates the initiative immediately.
design_decisions.end_to_end_gate: An initiative cannot close until ALL flows within its scope are verified -- not just the happy path. Ozi defines the flow scope at initiative creation and checks every branch before declaring completion.
design_decisions.celebration: Celebration is an explicit status step before close. It is not a silent status change. Ozi surfaces a celebration note to Mario: what was completed, what it enables, what the Wheel can now do. This is acknowledgment, not fanfare -- one clear statement of what was accomplished.
design_decisions.downstream_lug_cleanup: When an initiative closes, Ozi ensures all downstream lugs are resolved: completed (done), deferred with reason, or explicitly closed with a deprecation note. No initiative closes with orphaned open lugs in its scope.
design_decisions.ozi_review_cadence: Ozi reviews vision docs: (a) when a new vision doc is written by Wilbur archaeology, (b) when a vision doc is updated after Mario verification, (c) on each nightly Gardener run for spokes with active initiatives.
design_decisions.initiative_ownership: Initiatives live at the spoke level: {spoke}/WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/initiative/{status}/. Ozi creates them. Mario approves the scope before any downstream lugs are dispatched. Wilbur reads initiative status across spokes for the Wheel activity view.

initiative.title: string
initiative.vision_doc: string -- path to the vision doc that triggered this
initiative.flow_scope: string -- description of the end-to-end flow being completed
initiative.status: enum: draft | pending_approval | active | verifying | celebrating | closed

design_discussion.question: string -- the specific direction question for Mario

downstream_lugs.role: string -- what this lug contributes to the flow

flow_branches.description: string -- happy path or edge case

initiative.celebration_note: string -- written by Ozi at completion, surfaced to Mario

perceive.current_state: No initiative concept exists in WAI. Spoke vision docs are written but no agent has a protocol for acting on incomplete flows. Gaps sit in vision docs without becoming committed work. Ozi has no trigger to read vision docs. No lug type 'initiative' exists.

steps: 1. Create initiative lug type: add bytype/initiative/{draft,pending_approval,active,verifying,celebrating,closed}/ directory structure to standard spoke scaffold
2. Write framework/schemas/initiative.schema.json -- full JSON Schema for initiative files

3. Write framework/docs/ozi-initiative-protocol.md -- complete protocol: vision review trigger, flow completeness check, design discussion format, initiative creation, downstream lug management, verification gate, celebration, close
4. Update Ozi agent definition -- add vision review step to nightly Gardener protocol: after teachings + work execution, read new/updated vision docs and open initiatives for incomplete flows
5. Define design discussion format -- Ozi surfaces one question at a time, waits for answer before creating initiative. Format: structured markdown with context, options, and recommendation
6. Define celebration format -- one paragraph: what was completed, what it enables, what Mario can now do
8. Write a teaching: teaching-ozi-initiative-protocol-v1.md -- adopts the protocol into all spoke Ozi agents

done_when: framework/schemas/initiative.schema.json validates a sample initiative JSON
framework/docs/ozi-initiative-protocol.md covers: trigger, flow check, design discussion, creation, downstream management, verification gate, celebration, close
Ozi agent definition includes vision review step in nightly protocol
bytype/initiative/ directory structure added to standard spoke scaffold

acceptance_criteria: Initiative status enum includes 'celebrating' as a distinct step before 'closed'
Design discussion is triggered when vision doc recommendation is PIVOT or ASSESS -- never skipped
Downstream lug cleanup is a hard gate -- initiative cannot close with open lugs in scope
Ozi reads vision docs as part of nightly Gardener run, not as a separate manual step
Celebration note is surfaced to Mario explicitly, not silently written to a log
Initiative scope is Mario-approved before any downstream lugs are dispatched
target_files: framework/WAI-Spoke/skills/ -- MODIFY (add initiative bytype dirs to scaffold template)
